docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NURALIYEVA, YANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KERESZTI, TOM $1,163.54 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,238.54, (THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT ($4,000), PLUS ACCRUED INTEREST ($311.46), REDUCED BY UNPAID RENT ($4,355), AND REPAIR COSTS OTHER THAN NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR ($1,120). DEFENDANT MAY APPLY THE RENT BOARD AWARD OF $1,000 IN PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT, IF HE CHOSES.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NURALIYEVA, YANA AS TO DEFENDANT KERESZTI, TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED OCT-16-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KERESZTI, TOM
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
